text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Smart Falcon has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At her request, we decide to celebrate by using
the hot springs vacation coupon we won in a
raffle.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I looove hot springs! ♪ Hot spring antheeem! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And that's it for the hot spring medley! Brought to
you by Falco! ☆

text_block_list.name: Elderly People
text_block_list.text:
That was great, young lady!
Very cute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, Smart Falcon ends up joining a
dinner party being held by a group of customers
on a company trip.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I told you already. It's "Falco," not "young
lady." Fal-co. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You try it.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Person A
text_block_list.text: Fal... slow?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Person B
text_block_list.text: Good job, Falslow!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: No, that's way off! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm Falco—an Umadol on the stage and the track! In other words, I'm super fast!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the feature duet! ☆ Time for the Falco
and Trainer double-trouble unit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The lively party goes on for quite some time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew! We sang so much!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You, too! Thanks for coming with me, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I was surprised when you just jumped in there.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, sorry about that. ☆ But when I hear
people singing, I can't resist!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My policy as an Umadol is, "If you see a stage,
hop on it!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad everyone had a good time. They all
looked so happy after hearing me sing. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Being an Umadol really is the best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is unable to turn off Umadol mode,
even on our celebratory vacation. Putting smiles
on people's faces is her real reward.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehe. Yeah, I am. ☆
choice_data_list: Now let's take some time to relax.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That sounds good. Time to hit the hot springs and
get my skin all smooth and shiny!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whew... The water was great! ♪
choice_data_list: I like the evening breeze too.
I like the evening breeze too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, me too...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, can I ask you something?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Do you have fun when you're with me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've been throwing myself into running so hard up
until now...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Chasing after nothing but reckless dreams... I
know it must've been a lot of work for you too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I was wondering if it's been more fun or hard
work.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I see. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As long as you've made happy memories... then
I'm okay with you moving on.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Some people prefer cheering for someone chasing
their dreams over someone who's already made it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Even some of my fans have moved on for that
reason.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I don't think that's a bad thing. My shine hasn't
faded, they're just drawn in by a different kind of
light.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, if you want to help another dream come
true...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: I know you still want to shine.
I know you still want to shine.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list:
So won't you show me your next shining
performance?

So won't you show me your next shining
performance?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Of course... ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I... I'll always, always want you to—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Nothing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking how lucky I am to have such a
diehard fan!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All riiight! It's decided then!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to shine brighter and brighter! I'm
gonna be so dazzling you go blind!
choice_data_list: That might be a bit too much.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah! It was just a figure of speech!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: My mistake. ☆ Ehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Smart Falcon and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
